_description: Structured log of agent failures. Agents read this before starting to avoid known failure modes. Orchestrator appends entries after each FAIL or RETRY-3.

_append_format.failure_type: rate_limit | off_track | character_error | task_too_large | wrong_tool_used | output_missing | rule1_violation | format_error | brief_error | build_failure
_append_format.fix_applied: What the orchestrator changed before retry

failures.description: Helen briefed as 'early 40s' but BLUEPRINT.md locked her age as 70 — rewrites required after chapter was written
failures.fix_applied: brief-validator agent created and added as mandatory pre-flight before all writing agents

failures.description: Agent read settings.json instead of building the EPUB — phase completed with no artifact produced
failures.fix_applied: Replaced epub-builder-agent with build-manuscript.sh (Pandoc); quality-gate added between stages to catch missing artifacts

failures.description: Agent published without waiting for PUBLISH confirmation, set wrong categories, skipped AI questionnaire
failures.fix_applied: kdp-upload-agent rewritten with mandatory draft-only mode, human gate enforced, AI questionnaire confirmation required
